full_name: Standard Specification for Structural Steel Shapes
scope: Covers rolled structural steel wide-flange shapes for use in building framing or bridges, or for general structural purposes. It is the preferred standard for wide-flange (W) beams in the US.

mechanical_properties.elongation: 21% min in 50 mm; 18% min in 200 mm

license_note: Composition/property data widely republished by independent free sources (Wikipedia, steel section suppliers), not the copyrighted ASTM document text itself.
